name: Financial Analyst Squad+
description: 5-agent swarm for cross-market crypto analysis and fundamental monitoring.

agents.goal: Scan BTC/USD market using sc_market_scan and report entry signals.
agents.name: BTC Analyst

agents.goal: Scan ETH/USD market using sc_market_scan and report entry signals.
agents.name: ETH Analyst

agents.goal: Scan SOL/USD market using sc_market_scan and report entry signals.
agents.name: SOL Analyst

agents.goal: Continuously monitor the trading environment for unauthorized access or security risks.
agents.name: Security Sentinel

agents.goal: Research global macro news (interest rates, CPI) and provide a sentiment report.
agents.name: Fundamental Researcher
